conversations.name: notifications@mail.conversations.godaddy.com
conversations.subject: New contact form message for El Hombre Taco via Contact Us
conversations.last_msg:
---

Hannah, congratulations on your upcoming wedding! 🎉 We'd be honored to cater your big day at Gruene — what a beautiful location. With 114 guests, you're looking at approximately **$1,368–$2,052** depending on your menu selections (at our $12–18 per person range), and yes, we absolutely provide food truck service with full setup and staff included.

To move forward with a formal quote and secure your September 2027 date, **is Hannahk090502@gmail.com the best email to send over our complete package details and booking information, or would you prefer we call you?** We'll also need a callback number if you'd like to chat directly!

The El Hombre Taco Team

Message: Hello, I manage an apartment community near Manor, and would love to schedule a night for you all to come out. Can you email me over info and how much you charge?


---

---

Hey Cheyenne!

Thanks so much for reaching out — we'd love to bring El Hombre Taco to your community near Manor! Our catering packages start around $12–18 per person depending on your menu and headcount, and we handle all the setup, equipment, and staff. To give you a more precise quote and send over our full info, I've got a quick question: **roughly how many residents or guests are you thinking for this event, and do you have an approximate date in mind?**

Once I know those details, we can get you locked in!

The El Hombre Taco Team
